mapper.select:
SELECT cu.user_id AS userId, u.nickname AS nickname, COALESCE(u.avatar, '') AS avatar, cu.role AS role, cu.join_time AS joinTime FROM circle_user cu INNER JOIN `user` u ON cu.user_id = u.id AND u.deleted = 0 WHERE cu.circle_id = #{circleId} AND cu.audit_status = 1
AND u.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY cu.role DESC, cu.join_time DESC
